demos.briefing: SAQUEI — SaaS B2C BR. Tráfego atual: Google Ads + Meta Ads para landing R$ 29 relatório. Quer escalar com newsletter.
demos.reasoning: SAQUEI is a B2C SaaS in Brazil with a low-ticket entry point (R$ 29 report). Current paid traffic (Google + Meta) drives cold audiences to a landing page. The goal to scale via newsletter indicates a shift toward owned-media retention and upsell. The funnel must: (1) convert cold traffic to email subscribers at high volume, (2) nurture with valuable content to build trust, (3) upsell from report to higher-tier products/subscriptions, (4) retain and expand via engagement loops. Conversion thresholds should reflect B2C sensitivity: high top-of-funnel volume, moderate nurture-to-purchase, strong retention for expansion.
stages: Cold traffic → Landing page (lead magnet + R$ 29 report)
Email nurture sequence (7-10 days, value-first content)
Upsell to premium subscription or course
Expansion via referral or product ecosystem
demos.conversion_thresholds: Landing page 12% (cold → email) → nurture sequence 8% (email → click-through) → upsell 4% (nurture → paid upgrade) → retention 65% (month 2 active) → expansion 18% (referral or cross-sell)
copy_hooks: 'Descubra quanto você REALMENTE gasta por mês (relatório gratuito)'
'Os 3 erros que custam R$ 5k+ por ano aos brasileiros'
'Seu dinheiro trabalha 24h? Veja como os top 10% fazem'
'Indique um amigo e ganhe 3 meses grátis'
demos.automations: landing_page_submit → immediate R$ 29 report delivery + welcome email. day_1 → value email #1 (case study). day_3 → value email #2 (tip/framework). day_5 → soft upsell (premium tier). day_7 → social proof email (testimonials). cart_abandon → 2-email recovery sequence (24h + 48h). subscriber_inactive_14d → re-engagement campaign. subscriber_active_30d → referral incentive email.

demos.briefing: LUCAS/LUSOconta — SaaS contabilidade PT. Tráfego: LinkedIn outbound + referral contabilistas. Pricing 297€/mês.
demos.reasoning: LUSOconta targets Portuguese accountants & small business owners via LinkedIn outbound (high-intent B2B) and referral networks (trust-based). At €297/mth, the ACV is mid-market SaaS. The funnel must prioritize qualification (not all leads convert), build credibility through social proof, and leverage referral incentives. Key insight: accountants are risk-averse, so proof of compliance, data security, and ROI (time savings) are critical. Referral partners need clear commission structure to sustain pipeline.
stages: Demo Request Landing Page — qualification gate (company size, pain point)
Live/Recorded Demo + Case Study — proof of concept for similar firms
Conversion to Paid + Referral Incentive Setup — onboarding + partner commission
demos.conversion_thresholds: LinkedIn CTR 2.1% → demo request 18% → demo-to-trial 42% → trial-to-paid 28% → referral activation 65%
copy_hooks: Hook 1: 'Contabilistas em PT economizam 12h/semana com automação de declarações'
Hook 2: 'Conformidade fiscal 2024 garantida — ou devolvemos a subscrição'
Hook 3: 'De 47 clientes para 200+ em 8 meses: o case de Silva & Associados'
Email subject 1: 'Porque é que 340 contabilistas escolheram LUSOconta este ano'
Email subject 2: 'Ganhe €500/cliente referido — sem limite de comissão'
demos.automations: demo_request @ 0min → calendar link + compliance whitepaper. demo_completed @ 24h → trial activation email + onboarding video. trial_end @ day 13 → conversion offer (first month 50% off) + success story. trial_abandoned @ day 7 → 1-call rescue sequence. referral_signup @ conversion → partner dashboard access + commission tracking + monthly payout automation.

signature.instructions:
Design a multi-stage marketing funnel for the business described.

Must specify the stages (typically 4-6), conversion thresholds, key
copy hooks, CTAs per stage, and automation triggers.

fields.description: Business, product, target, pricing, current traffic source.
Funnel stages in order, each with name + purpose.
Per-stage conversion benchmark (% expected). One per stage.
Headline / hook per stage (3-5 of them).
